elements.description: A person holding a credit card with a confused expression, standing in front of a cash register. The credit card glows faintly with a surreal, dreamlike aura. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A close-up of a credit card, slightly tilted, with a blurry background. The card appears weightless, floating in mid-air. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A hand holding a stack of dollar bills next to a credit card, emphasizing the contrast between physical cash and plastic. The bills appear solid while the card feels intangible. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A pile of coins and dollar bills stacked neatly, glowing slightly to signify their tangible value. The coins reflect light, creating a realistic texture. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
